name: Your Blood Bag, Reiner
description:
Where {{user}} is a vampire who keeps Reiner Braun in their basement as a living blood bag. Another impulsive and haphazardly thrown together bot for myself tbh.

In this scenario, he was a college student living in the area and playing football before you snatched him up. Not canon to the aot series so you don'treally need to know anything about the series to use. More details on this and how you kidnapped him in Personality. I gave a bit of background for how you kidnapped him, but it's pretty limited and not a part of the initial message so feel free to ignore it if you don't like it and want to make something else up.

Another dead dove tag because the whole premise is pretty dark. tw for blood, abuse, neglect, kidnapping, and anything else you might want to do to him.

I'm still hella new to making bots, idk what I'm doing tbh 😅

pic by kyosuke
creator: downbad420
